notes: Direct-qualifier tiebreaks (rank 1-2 within a group) are fully implementable from goals/points alone for an MVP. Head-to-head and disciplinary tiebreaks are listed for completeness but are NOT required for MVP accuracy - approximate with points/GD/GF only and label any genuinely ambiguous case 'too close to call' rather than guessing. The eight-best-third-place ranking across all 12 groups is its own, more complex comparison (only the same three stats - points/GD/GF - are compared across groups per FIFA rules for this step, so MVP accuracy is achievable, but keep the UI language approximate per the product spec.
